name: radar-for-claude-code
displayName: Radar for Claude Code: 💬 working, ⚠️ needs you, 🟢 done
description: Claude Code multitasking, done right. Run it across a handful of projects and each window title shows what its Claude is up to: working, needs you, or done. Turn on native tabs and your tab bar becomes a live status board, so you always know which project to jump to next. Plus a banner and sound when a window's in the background. macOS only.

commands.title: Radar for Claude Code: Add ${claudeRadarStatus} to window.title
Radar for Claude Code: Install Claude hooks
Radar for Claude Code: Remove Claude hooks
Radar for Claude Code: Clear marker
Radar for Claude Code: Mute banners for 1 hour
Radar for Claude Code: Unmute banners

claudeRadar.markerWorking.description: Shown while Claude is working. Always visible, no banner or sound. Just the emoji, the space is added for you.

claudeRadar.showWorkingTime.description: Append how long Claude has been working to the working marker (💬 14m). Updates once a minute.

claudeRadar.markerWaiting.description: Shown when Claude needs you (a question or a permission). Just the emoji.

claudeRadar.markerDone.description: Shown when Claude is done. Just the emoji.

claudeRadar.banner.description: Show a macOS banner when Claude needs you or is done (background windows only).

claudeRadar.soundWaiting.description: Sound when Claude needs you. macOS sound name, empty for silent.

claudeRadar.soundDone.description: Sound when Claude is done. Empty for silent.

claudeRadar.shellTasksKeepWorking.description: Keep the working marker while a background shell task Claude started (e.g. a dev server) is still running. When off, only subagents, workflows, and monitors hold the working state after a turn ends.
